title: rhododendron × williamsii
intro: Rhododendron × williamsii, also known as Williams' Rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Rhododendron ponticum and Rhododendron dauricum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are found in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Rhododendron × williamsii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and are used to harness its medicinal properties.
